title: Oil Companies Losing Rs 1,600 Crore Daily. Will Rs 3 Petrol Hike Be Enough?
summary_full: OMCs' production costs have "gone through the roof in the past month", Petroleum Minister Hardeep Singh Puri said last month after the governemnt cut central excise taxes to ease burdens.
summary_public: OMCs' production costs have "gone through the roof in the past month", Petroleum Minister Hardeep Singh Puri said last month after the governemnt cut central excise taxes to ease burdens.
